---
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, styles.css]
    title-slide: false
    transition: fade
    transition-speed: slow
    slide-number: true
    controls: true
    progress: false
    width: 1920
    height: 1080
    margin: 0.04
    center: false
    hash: true
    history: true
    embed-resources: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7/dist/d3.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/topojson-client@3"></script>
---

## {#title-custom .title-slide data-background-color="#f8f5f0"}

```{=html}
<div class="title-cover" style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:center; height:100%; padding:0 60px;">
  <!-- WB Group Logo -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:2.5em;">
    <img src="images/wb-group-logo.svg" alt="World Bank Group" style="height:48px; opacity:0.85;" />
  </div>
  <!-- Decorative accent line -->
  <div style="width:100px; height:5px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8b1a2d, #b85c70); margin-bottom:1.8em; border-radius:3px;"></div>
  <!-- Main title -->
  <h1 style="font-size:4em; font-weight:900; letter-spacing:-0.03em; color:#8b1a2d; margin:0 0 0.15em 0; line-height:1.05; font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;">Water Services<br>in Transition</h1>
  <!-- Subtitle -->
  <div style="font-size:1.7em; color:#1a3a5c; font-weight:700; margin-top:0.4em; font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; letter-spacing:-0.01em;">From Crisis to Smart Investment</div>
  <!-- Thin separator -->
  <div style="width:60px; height:2px; background:#c8d8e4; margin:1.8em 0;"></div>
  <!-- Department & Event -->
  <div style="font-size:1.05em; color:#4a5568; font-weight:600; font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif;">World Bank Group | Global Water Department</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.9em; color:#6b7280; margin-top:0.6em; font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; letter-spacing:0.04em;">Spring Meetings &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; April 2026</div>
</div>
```


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SCENE 1b: THE SCALE OF THE CRISIS — Animated Infographic
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## {#water-crisis-scale data-background-image="images/water-bg.svg" data-background-size="cover"}

```{=html}
<div class="crisis-grid crisis-grid-dark">

  <div class="crisis-stat fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="0">
    <svg class="crisis-icon" viewBox="0 0 32 32" width="28" height="28"><path d="M16 3 C16 3 6 16 6 22 C6 27.5 10.5 30 16 30 C21.5 30 26 27.5 26 22 C26 16 16 3 16 3Z" fill="none" stroke="#d4909e" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
    <div class="crisis-accent"></div>
    <div class="crisis-value"><span class="info-number" data-counter="4" data-suffix=" billion">0</span></div>
    <div class="crisis-desc">people live in water-scarce areas</div>
    <div class="crisis-sub"><strong>1 in 4</strong> cities face water insecurity</div>
  </div>

  <div class="crisis-stat fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="1">
    <svg class="crisis-icon" viewBox="0 0 32 32" width="28" height="28"><path d="M10 8 L10 18 C10 23 13 26 18 26 L18 26" fill="none" stroke="#d4909e" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="18" cy="26" r="2" fill="#d4909e"/><path d="M6 12 L14 12" stroke="#d4909e" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M20 14 L20 10 M20 10 L17 13 M20 10 L23 13" fill="none" stroke="#c8d8e4" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
    <div class="crisis-accent"></div>
    <div class="crisis-value"><span class="info-number" data-counter="2100" data-display="2.1 billion" data-suffix="">0</span></div>
    <div class="crisis-desc">lack safely managed water supply</div>
    <div class="crisis-sub">1 in 4 people worldwide</div>
  </div>

  <div class="crisis-stat fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="2">
    <svg class="crisis-icon" viewBox="0 0 32 32" width="28" height="28"><rect x="8" y="6" width="16" height="20" rx="2" fill="none" stroke="#d4909e" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="16" y1="6" x2="16" y2="26" stroke="#d4909e" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="16" cy="16" r="3" fill="none" stroke="#c8d8e4" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
    <div class="crisis-accent"></div>
    <div class="crisis-value"><span class="info-number" data-counter="3400" data-display="3.4 billion" data-suffix="">0</span></div>
    <div class="crisis-desc">lack safely managed sanitation</div>
    <div class="crisis-sub">42% of the global population</div>
  </div>

  <div class="crisis-stat fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="3">
    <svg class="crisis-icon" viewBox="0 0 32 32" width="28" height="28"><circle cx="16" cy="16" r="12" fill="none" stroke="#d4909e" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="16" y1="16" x2="16" y2="8" stroke="#d4909e" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="16" y1="16" x2="22" y2="18" stroke="#c8d8e4" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="16" cy="16" r="1.5" fill="#d4909e"/></svg>
    <div class="crisis-accent"></div>
    <div class="crisis-value">Every <span class="info-number info-number-inline" data-counter="100" data-suffix=" seconds">0</span></div>
    <div class="crisis-desc">a child dies from diarrhoea linked to</div>
    <div class="crisis-sub">inadequate water and sanitation</div>
  </div>

</div>
```

::: {.source .source-light}
Source: WHO/UNICEF JMP (2025), World Bank
:::


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SCENE 1b2: CONTINENTAL DRYING MAP
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## {#continental-drying data-background-color="#f8f5f0"}

```{=html}
<style>
  #cd-book-scene { perspective: 1800px; width: 480px; height: 680px; }
  #cd-book-3d {
    position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
    transform: rotateY(-15deg);
  }
  .cd-page {
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
    transform-origin: left center; backface-visibility: hidden;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; overflow: hidden;
    transition: transform 1.0s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  }
  .cd-spine {
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: -20px; width: 20px; height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1e1508, #3d2b0f, #4A3810);
    transform: rotateY(90deg); transform-origin: right center; border-radius: 4px 0 0 4px;
  }
  .cd-back { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #f5f0e5; border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0; z-index: 0; transform: translateZ(-20px); }
</style>

<div id="cd-slide-wrapper" style="position:relative; width:100%; height:920px; overflow:hidden;">
  <!-- Book overlay -->
  <div id="cd-cover-layer" style="position:absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; z-index:20; background:#f5f0e5; transform-origin: center center;">
    <div id="cd-book-scene">
      <div id="cd-book-3d">
        <div class="cd-spine"></div>
        <!-- Back — cream page visible after all flips -->
        <div class="cd-back" style="background:#f5f0e5;"></div>
        <!-- Page 2 -->
        <div class="cd-page" id="cd-pg2" style="z-index:3; background:#f2ece0; border-radius:0 3px 3px 0; box-shadow:2px 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);">
          <img src="images/cd_page_2.png" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; opacity:0.7;" />
        </div>
        <!-- Page 1 -->
        <div class="cd-page" id="cd-pg1" style="z-index:4; background:#f5f0e5; border-radius:0 3px 3px 0; box-shadow:2px 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);">
          <img src="images/cd_page_1.png" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; opacity:0.7;" />
        </div>
        <!-- Front cover -->
        <div class="cd-page" id="cd-cover-page" style="z-index:5;">
          <img src="images/cd_report_cover.png" alt="Continental Drying" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; border-radius:0 6px 6px 0; box-shadow:8px 6px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Source — shown with map content -->
  <div id="cd-source" style="position:absolute; bottom:20px; left:60px; font-size:0.6em; color:#6b7280; font-style:italic; opacity:0; z-index:5;">
    Source: GRACE/GRACE-FO satellite data; Continental Drying — A Threat to Our Common Future, World Bank
  </div>

  <!-- Map content — hidden initially -->
  <div id="cd-map-content" style="opacity:0;">
    <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size:1.8em; font-weight:900; color:#8b1a2d; letter-spacing:-0.02em; border-bottom:4px solid; border-image:linear-gradient(90deg,#8b1a2d,#b85c70) 1; padding-bottom:0.25em; display:inline-block; margin:0 0 0.15em 0;">Emergence of Continental-Scale Mega-Drying Regions</h3>
    <p style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:1.0em; color:#4a5568; line-height:1.4; margin:0 0 0.2em 0;">
      Terrestrial freshwater availability is decreasing at an annual rate of <strong style="color:#1a3a5c;">324 billion cubic meters</strong>, which is enough to meet the annual water needs of <strong style="color:#1a3a5c;">280 million people</strong>.
    </p>
    <div id="cd-map-container" style="width:100%; height:660px;"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Fragment trigger -->
  <div class="fragment cd-cover-trigger" data-fragment-index="0"></div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  function setup() {
    var cdTimers = [];

    function resetBook() {
      cdTimers.forEach(clearTimeout);
      cdTimers = [];
      var ids = ['cd-cover-page', 'cd-pg1', 'cd-pg2'];
      ids.forEach(function(id) {
        var el = document.getElementById(id);
        if (el) { el.style.transition = 'none'; el.style.transform = 'rotateY(0deg)'; }
      });
      var book = document.getElementById('cd-book-3d');
      if (book) { book.style.transition = 'none'; book.style.transform = 'rotateY(-15deg)'; }
      var layer = document.getElementById('cd-cover-layer');
      if (layer) { layer.style.transition = 'none'; layer.style.transform = 'scale(1)'; layer.style.opacity = '1'; layer.style.pointerEvents = 'auto'; layer.style.background = '#f5f0e5'; }
      var content = document.getElementById('cd-map-content');
      if (content) { content.style.transition = 'none'; content.style.opacity = '0'; }
      var source = document.getElementById('cd-source');
      if (source) { source.style.transition = 'none'; source.style.opacity = '0'; }
      var source = document.getElementById('cd-source');
      if (source) { source.style.transition = 'none'; source.style.opacity = '0'; }
    }

    function openBook() {
      resetBook();
      var cover = document.getElementById('cd-cover-page');
      var pg1 = document.getElementById('cd-pg1');
      var pg2 = document.getElementById('cd-pg2');
      var book = document.getElementById('cd-book-3d');
      var layer = document.getElementById('cd-cover-layer');
      var content = document.getElementById('cd-map-content');
      var source = document.getElementById('cd-source');

      // Force reflow
      void cover.offsetHeight;

      // 0ms: Straighten book
      book.style.transition = 'transform 0.6s ease-out';
      book.style.transform = 'rotateY(0deg)';

      // 400ms: Cover opens
      cdTimers.push(setTimeout(function() {
        cover.style.transition = 'transform 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)';
        cover.style.transform = 'rotateY(-170deg)';
      }, 400));

      // 1600ms: Page 1 flips
      cdTimers.push(setTimeout(function() {
        pg1.style.transition = 'transform 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.3, 0, 0.2, 1)';
        pg1.style.transform = 'rotateY(-165deg)';
      }, 1600));

      // 2400ms: Page 2 flips
      cdTimers.push(setTimeout(function() {
        pg2.style.transition = 'transform 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.3, 0, 0.2, 1)';
        pg2.style.transform = 'rotateY(-160deg)';
      }, 2400));

      // 3400ms: Zoom into book (cream back page scales up)
      cdTimers.push(setTimeout(function() {
        layer.style.transition = 'transform 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.8s 0.6s ease-out';
        layer.style.transform = 'scale(5)';
        layer.style.opacity = '0';
        layer.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      }, 3400));

      // 4200ms: Map emerges
      cdTimers.push(setTimeout(function() {
        content.style.transition = 'opacity 0.8s ease-out';
        content.style.opacity = '1';
        var source = document.getElementById('cd-source');
        if (source) { source.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease-out'; source.style.opacity = '1'; }
      }, 4200));
    }

    Reveal.on('fragmentshown', function(ev) {
      if (ev.fragment.classList.contains('cd-cover-trigger')) openBook();
    });
    Reveal.on('fragmenthidden', function(ev) {
      if (ev.fragment.classList.contains('cd-cover-trigger')) resetBook();
    });
    // Reset when leaving the slide
    Reveal.on('slidechanged', function(ev) {
      if (ev.previousSlide && ev.previousSlide.id === 'continental-drying') resetBook();
    });
  }

  if (typeof Reveal !== 'undefined' && Reveal.isReady && Reveal.isReady()) setup();
  else if (typeof Reveal !== 'undefined') Reveal.on('ready', setup);
  else document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { setTimeout(setup, 500); });
})();
</script>
```


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SCENE 1b3: ENERGY PRICING & WATER DEPLETION
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## {#energy-pricing data-background-color="#f8f5f0"}

### Energy Subsidies Accelerate Groundwater Depletion

```{=html}
<div style="position:relative; height:840px;">
  <div id="chart-energy-pricing" class="chart-container" style="height:780px; overflow:visible;"></div>

  <!-- Explainer popup — appears on arrow click -->
  <div id="energy-explainer" class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="0"
       style="position:absolute; top:100px; right:30px; width:420px; background:rgba(248,245,240,0.97); border:2px solid #8b1a2d; border-radius:12px; padding:28px 32px; box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); z-index:10;">
    <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size:1.1em; font-weight:900; color:#8b1a2d; margin-bottom:0.5em; line-height:1.2;">Why This Matters</div>
    <p style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.92em; color:#4a5568; line-height:1.5; margin:0;">
      Energy subsidies make groundwater pumping artificially cheap, accelerating depletion. Correcting these pricing distortions is one of the most effective levers to preserve freshwater resources.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.source}
Source: Continental Drying — A Threat to Our Common Future, World Bank
:::


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SCENE 1c: TRIPLE BURDEN CONCEPT — Converging Circles
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## {#triple-burden-concept data-background-color="#f8f5f0"}

### The Triple Burden

```{=html}
<div id="tb-layout" style="position:relative; height:820px; overflow:hidden;">
  <!-- Venn diagram — starts centered, slides left on fragment -->
  <div id="tb-venn" class="tb-venn-centered" style="position:absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; transition: transform 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 900 650" width="100%" height="100%" style="max-width:1300px;">
    <defs>
      <linearGradient id="grad-climate" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2e6da4" stop-opacity="0.8"/>
        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1a3a5c" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      </linearGradient>
      <linearGradient id="grad-poverty" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#b85c70" stop-opacity="0.8"/>
        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8b1a2d" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      </linearGradient>
      <linearGradient id="grad-sanitation" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6699cc" stop-opacity="0.8"/>
        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2e6da4" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      </linearGradient>
      <radialGradient id="grad-center">
        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.3"/>
        <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#8b1a2d" stop-opacity="0.6"/>
        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#5a1020" stop-opacity="0.85"/>
      </radialGradient>
    </defs>

    <!-- Three converging circles -->
    <circle class="tb-circle tb-circle-1" cx="290" cy="195" r="185" fill="url(#grad-climate)" opacity="0.7"/>
    <circle class="tb-circle tb-circle-2" cx="610" cy="195" r="185" fill="url(#grad-poverty)" opacity="0.7"/>
    <circle class="tb-circle tb-circle-3" cx="450" cy="420" r="185" fill="url(#grad-sanitation)" opacity="0.7"/>

    <!-- Center convergence -->
    <circle class="tb-center" cx="450" cy="275" r="50" fill="url(#grad-center)" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2.5"/>

    <!-- Dashed flow lines -->
    <path class="tb-flow tb-flow-1" d="M 290 195 Q 370 230 450 275" stroke="#1a3a5c" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="6,4"/>
    <path class="tb-flow tb-flow-2" d="M 610 195 Q 530 230 450 275" stroke="#8b1a2d" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="6,4"/>
    <path class="tb-flow tb-flow-3" d="M 450 420 Q 450 345 450 275" stroke="#2e6da4" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="6,4"/>

    <!-- Circle labels — centered at each circle's center -->
    <g class="tb-label tb-label-1">
      <text x="290" y="188" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ffffff" font-size="26" font-weight="700" font-family="-apple-system, sans-serif">High Climate Risk</text>
      <text x="290" y="216" text-anchor="middle" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.85)" font-size="17" font-style="italic" font-family="-apple-system, sans-serif">Droughts &amp; floods</text>
    </g>
    <g class="tb-label tb-label-2">
      <text x="610" y="195" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ffffff" font-size="26" font-weight="700" font-family="-apple-system, sans-serif">High Poverty</text>
    </g>
    <g class="tb-label tb-label-3">
      <text x="450" y="410" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-weight="700" font-family="-apple-system, sans-serif">Low Access to Water &amp;</text>
      <text x="450" y="440" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-weight="700" font-family="-apple-system, sans-serif">Sanitation Services</text>
    </g>

    <!-- Center text -->
    <g class="tb-center-text">
      <text x="450" y="268" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ffffff" font-size="20" font-weight="700" font-family="-apple-system, sans-serif" letter-spacing="2">TRIPLE</text>
      <text x="450" y="294" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8b4c0" font-size="20" font-weight="700" font-family="-apple-system, sans-serif" letter-spacing="2">BURDEN</text>
    </g>
  </svg>
  </div>

  <!-- Explainer text (right side, hidden initially) -->
  <div id="tb-explainer" style="position:absolute; top:0; left:56%; width:41%; height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; padding:40px 40px 40px 0; opacity:0; transform:translateX(40px); transition: opacity 0.8s 0.6s ease-out, transform 0.8s 0.6s ease-out;">
    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="0" style="margin-bottom:1.2em;">
      <div style="font-size:1.35em; font-weight:700; color:#8b1a2d; line-height:1.2; font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;">Areas experiencing the Triple Burden are the most vulnerable</div>
    </div>
    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="1" style="margin-bottom:1.0em; padding-left:1.2em; border-left:4px solid #b85c70;">
      <p style="font-size:1.0em; color:#4a5568; line-height:1.45; margin:0;">Poor water and sanitation access combined with poverty creates a <strong style="color:#1a3a5c;">poverty trap</strong>, increasing mortality, stalling human capital, and reducing earnings across generations.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="2" style="padding-left:1.2em; border-left:4px solid #2e6da4;">
      <p style="font-size:1.0em; color:#4a5568; line-height:1.45; margin:0;">Those trapped are <strong style="color:#1a3a5c;">less resilient to climate shocks</strong>. Water infrastructure is vulnerable to droughts and floods, while poor sanitation generates emissions that worsen climate risks.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// Venn slide-left on fragment reveal
(function() {
  function setupFragmentListeners() {
    if (typeof Reveal === 'undefined') return;
    // TB Venn slide-left
    Reveal.on('fragmentshown', function(ev) {
      if (ev.fragment.closest && ev.fragment.closest('#tb-layout')) {
        document.getElementById('tb-venn').classList.replace('tb-venn-centered', 'tb-venn-shifted');
        document.getElementById('tb-explainer').classList.add('tb-explainer-visible');
      }
      // World line trigger on tariff charts
      if (ev.fragment.classList.contains('world-line-trigger')) {
        var chartId = ev.fragment.getAttribute('data-chart');
        var container = document.getElementById(chartId);
        if (container && container._showWorldLine) container._showWorldLine();
      }
    });
    Reveal.on('fragmenthidden', function(ev) {
      if (ev.fragment.closest && ev.fragment.closest('#tb-layout')) {
        var remaining = document.querySelectorAll('#tb-layout .fragment.visible');
        if (remaining.length === 0) {
          document.getElementById('tb-venn').classList.replace('tb-venn-shifted', 'tb-venn-centered');
          document.getElementById('tb-explainer').classList.remove('tb-explainer-visible');
        }
      }
      // Hide World line
      if (ev.fragment.classList.contains('world-line-trigger')) {
        var chartId = ev.fragment.getAttribute('data-chart');
        var container = document.getElementById(chartId);
        if (container && container._hideWorldLine) container._hideWorldLine();
      }
    });
  }
  if (typeof Reveal !== 'undefined' && Reveal.isReady && Reveal.isReady()) {
    setupFragmentListeners();
  } else if (typeof Reveal !== 'undefined') {
    Reveal.on('ready', setupFragmentListeners);
  } else {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { setTimeout(setupFragmentListeners, 500); });
  }
})();
</script>
```

::: {.source}
Source: World Bank Triple Burden Analysis (2025)
:::


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SCENE 2: TRIPLE BURDEN — WATER MAP
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## {#triple-burden-water}

### In developing countries, 1.1 billion people (17.4%) live under high poverty, high risk of droughts, and low access to water services

```{=html}
<div id="tb-map-water" style="width:100%; height:840px; position:relative;"></div>
```




<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SCENE 3: TRIPLE BURDEN — SANITATION MAP
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## {#triple-burden-sanitation}

### 1.1 billion people live under high poverty, high risk of flooding, and low access to sanitation services

```{=html}
<div id="tb-map-sanitation" style="width:100%; height:840px; position:relative;"></div>
```


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SCENE 5: SPENDING GAP
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## {#spending-gap .iframe-slide background-color="#f8f5f0" background-iframe="https://spending-gaps-standalone.replit.app/" background-interactive="true"}


## {#budget-execution .iframe-slide background-color="#f8f5f0" background-iframe="https://budget-execution-standalone.replit.app/" background-interactive="true"}

```{=html}
<script>
// Inject cover elements over iframe top borders
(function() {
  function addCovers() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.slide-background-content').forEach(function(el) {
      if (el.querySelector('iframe') && !el.querySelector('.iframe-border-cover')) {
        var cover = document.createElement('div');
        cover.className = 'iframe-border-cover';
        el.appendChild(cover);
      }
    });
  }
  if (typeof Reveal !== 'undefined') {
    if (Reveal.isReady && Reveal.isReady()) { setTimeout(addCovers, 1000); }
    else { Reveal.on('ready', function() { setTimeout(addCovers, 1000); }); }
  } else {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { setTimeout(addCovers, 2000); });
  }
})();
</script>
```





## {#tariffs-nominal data-background-color="#ffffff"}

```{=html}
<div id="hero-chart-tariffs-nominal" class="hero-chart-container chart-full"></div>
<div class="fragment world-line-trigger" data-fragment-index="0" data-chart="hero-chart-tariffs-nominal"></div>
```

::: {.source}
Source: IBNET Tariff Portal, constant 2025 USD
:::


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SCENE 8: NRW — Hero Chart State 2
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## {#nrw data-background-color="#ffffff"}

```{=html}
<div id="hero-chart-nrw" class="hero-chart-container chart-full"></div>
```

::: {.source}
Source: Regulators Performance Database, IBNET
:::



<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SCENE 10: AFFORDABILITY — Paired bar chart
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## {#affordability data-background-color="#ffffff"}

```{=html}
<div id="hero-chart-affordability" class="hero-chart-container chart-full"></div>
```

::: {.source}
Source: IBNET Tariff Portal, World Bank
:::


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SCENE 11: AGRICULTURAL WATER PRICING
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## {#ag-pricing data-background-color="#f8f5f0"}

### Agricultural Water Pricing: The Missing Price Signal

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; gap:50px; align-items:flex-start; margin-top:0.5em;">

  <!-- Left: key stats -->
  <div style="flex:1;">

    <div style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:1.05em; color:#4a5568; line-height:1.5; margin-bottom:1.5em;">
      The largest water user often faces the weakest price signal.
    </div>

    <!-- Big stat: 70% -->
    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="0" style="background:#f0e8e4; border-radius:12px; padding:24px 30px; margin-bottom:1.2em; border-left:5px solid #8b1a2d;">
      <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size:2.8em; font-weight:900; color:#8b1a2d; line-height:1;">70%</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.95em; color:#4a5568; margin-top:0.3em;">of freshwater diverted by human activity goes to irrigation</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Stat: 26/80 -->
    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="1" style="background:#f0e8e4; border-radius:12px; padding:24px 30px; margin-bottom:1.2em; border-left:5px solid #1a3a5c;">
      <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size:2.8em; font-weight:900; color:#1a3a5c; line-height:1;">26 <span style="font-size:0.45em; color:#6b7280; font-weight:600;">out of</span> 80</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.95em; color:#4a5568; margin-top:0.3em;">countries with available data use volumetric pricing for agriculture</div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Right: explanation -->
  <div style="flex:1;">

    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="2" style="margin-bottom:1.4em; padding-left:1.2em; border-left:4px solid #b85c70;">
      <p style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.95em; color:#4a5568; line-height:1.55; margin:0;">
        Agricultural water is <strong style="color:#8b1a2d;">rarely priced or metered</strong>. Fixed-charge systems do not encourage conservation, because costs are often unrelated to actual consumption.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="3" style="padding-left:1.2em; border-left:4px solid #2e6da4;">
      <p style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.95em; color:#4a5568; line-height:1.55; margin:0;">
        Current agricultural pricing structures often <strong style="color:#1a3a5c;">fail to reflect scarcity</strong> or create strong incentives for conservation in the largest water-using sector.
      </p>
    </div>

  </div>

</div>
```

::: {.source}
Source: Chakravorty, Dar, Emerick (2023), American Economic Journal: Applied Economics, 15(1)
:::


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SCENE 12: POLICY RECOMMENDATIONS
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## {#policy-recommendations data-background-color="#f8f5f0"}

### Policy Recommendations

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; gap:60px; margin-top:0.4em;">

  <!-- Column 1: Tariff Reform -->
  <div style="flex:1;">
    <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size:1.15em; font-weight:900; color:#8b1a2d; margin-bottom:0.8em;">Tariff Reform in Water Compacts</div>

    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="0" style="padding-left:1.1em; border-left:3px solid #8b1a2d; margin-bottom:1.1em;">
      <p style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.82em; color:#282c34; line-height:1.5; margin:0;"><strong>Establish independent regulators</strong> with legal authority to set cost-reflective tariffs and protect consumers.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="1" style="padding-left:1.1em; border-left:3px solid #2e6da4; margin-bottom:1.1em;">
      <p style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.82em; color:#282c34; line-height:1.5; margin:0;"><strong>Adopt incentive-based tariff methodology</strong> (Regulated Asset Base) to allow long-term capital recovery and attract investment.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="2" style="padding-left:1.1em; border-left:3px solid #6699cc; margin-bottom:1.1em;">
      <p style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.82em; color:#282c34; line-height:1.5; margin:0;"><strong>Replace universal with targeted subsidies.</strong> Phase out blanket subsidies. Use output-based aid, social connection grants, or IBT lifeline rates.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="3" style="padding-left:1.1em; border-left:3px solid #b85c70;">
      <p style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.82em; color:#282c34; line-height:1.5; margin:0;"><strong>Link tariffs to service quality KPIs</strong> (NRW, service hours, water quality, bill collection). Builds public acceptance of reform.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Column 2: Enabling Conditions -->
  <div style="flex:1;">
    <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size:1.15em; font-weight:900; color:#1a3a5c; margin-bottom:0.8em;">Enabling Conditions for Investment</div>

    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="4" style="padding-left:1.1em; border-left:3px solid #1a3a5c; margin-bottom:1.1em;">
      <p style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.82em; color:#282c34; line-height:1.5; margin:0;"><strong>Regulatory and governance clarity.</strong> Clear contract enforcement, tariff methodology, investor protection through independent regulators.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="5" style="padding-left:1.1em; border-left:3px solid #2e6da4; margin-bottom:1.1em;">
      <p style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.82em; color:#282c34; line-height:1.5; margin:0;"><strong>Sector financial sustainability.</strong> Cost-reflective tariffs, creditworthy utilities with audited financials, ring-fenced revenues for O&M.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="6" style="padding-left:1.1em; border-left:3px solid #6699cc; margin-bottom:1.1em;">
      <p style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.82em; color:#282c34; line-height:1.5; margin:0;"><strong>Political and social acceptability.</strong> Government commitment at highest level with affordability safeguards and stakeholder engagement.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="fragment fade-up" data-fragment-index="7" style="padding-left:1.1em; border-left:3px solid #b85c70;">
      <p style="font-family:'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size:0.82em; color:#282c34; line-height:1.5; margin:0;"><strong>Scale private participation</strong> from BOT bulk supply (nascent) to management contracts (developing) to concessions (maturing) to capital markets and green bonds (advanced).</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

::: {.source}
Source: WSIP 2025; World Bank Water Tariff Roadmap 2026
:::


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SCRIPTS (loaded at end for performance)
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<script src="scripts/main.js?v=6"></script>
<script src="scripts/hero-chart.js?v=6"></script>
<script src="scripts/coverage-map.js"></script>
<script src="scripts/cd-chart.js?v=4"></script>
<script src="scripts/cd-map.js?v=2"></script>
<script src="scripts/tb-chart.js?v=5"></script>
<script>
// Robust chart dispatch — runs after all scripts load
var CD_SLIDES = ['freshwater-loss', 'land-use-tws', 'energy-tws', 'energy-pricing'];
(function() {
  function setup() {
    Reveal.on('slidechanged', function(ev) {
      var id = ev.currentSlide.id || '';
      if (typeof HERO_SLIDES !== 'undefined' && HERO_SLIDES.indexOf(id) !== -1) {
        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('hero-morph', { detail: { state: id } }));
      }
      if (CD_SLIDES.indexOf(id) !== -1) {
        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('cd-render', { detail: { slide: id } }));
      }
    });
    // Also fire for the current slide in case we missed the initial slidechanged
    var curr = Reveal.getCurrentSlide();
    if (curr) {
      var id = curr.id || '';
      if (typeof HERO_SLIDES !== 'undefined' && HERO_SLIDES.indexOf(id) !== -1) {
        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('hero-morph', { detail: { state: id } }));
      }
      if (CD_SLIDES.indexOf(id) !== -1) {
        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('cd-render', { detail: { slide: id } }));
      }
    }
  }
  if (typeof Reveal !== 'undefined' && Reveal.isReady()) setup();
  else if (typeof Reveal !== 'undefined') Reveal.on('ready', setup);
  else document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { setTimeout(setup, 500); });
})();
</script>
